Introduction
Data Science has become one of the fastest-growing career domains in the IT industry. Organizations across healthcare, finance, e-commerce, banking, manufacturing, and technology are hiring skilled data science professionals to analyze data, build predictive models, and support business decisions.
If you are looking for a software training institute in Pune that offers practical data science training with placement assistance, Skills IT Academy in Karve Nagar is a strong choice for students, fresh graduates, career switchers, and working professionals. Skills IT Academy offers data science with AI & machine learning training, practical projects, interview preparation, and placement assistance.
Why Choose Skills IT Academy for Data Science?
A successful data science career requires much more than learning theory. Employers search for candidates who can work with real datasets, build machine learning models, visualize data, and solve business problems.
Skills IT Academy focuses on practical learning to help students become job-ready.
The institute offers the following:

• Industry-oriented curriculum

• Hands-on practical sessions

• Real-time projects

• Live case studies

• Interview preparation

• Resume building

• Placement assistance
Students learn under the guidance of experienced trainers who focus on practical implementation and industry requirements.
Data Science Course Curriculum
The curriculum is designed to help beginners as well as professionals build complete data science skills.
Python Programming
Students begin with Python programming, one of the most widely used languages in data science.
Topics include:

• Python Fundamentals

• Functions

• Object-Oriented Programming

• File Handling

• Exception Handling
Data Analysis
Students learn how to clean, organize, and analyze datasets using industry-standard tools.
Topics include:

• NumPy

• Pandas

• Data Cleaning

• Data Manipulation
Statistics and Probability
A strong understanding of statistics helps students build accurate machine learning models.
Topics include:

• Descriptive Statistics

• Probability

• Hypothesis Testing

• Data Distribution
Data Visualization
Students learn to present insights through interactive dashboards and charts.
Tools covered include:

• Power BI

• Tableau

• Matplotlib
Machine Learning
The course introduces both supervised and unsupervised learning techniques.
Students learn:

• Linear Regression

• Logistic Regression

• Decision Trees

• Random Forest

• Clustering

• Model Evaluation
Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
Students also gain exposure to modern AI concepts and practical machine learning applications.
SQL for Data Science
Database management is an essential skill for data scientists.
Students learn:

• SQL Queries

• Joins

• Aggregations

• Database Operations
Real-Time Projects
Project-based learning is one of the biggest strengths of the program.
Students work on practical datasets and industry-oriented projects that help them apply their knowledge in real-world scenarios.
Placement Assistance
Skills IT Academy provides placement assistance to help students prepare for the recruitment process.
Placement support includes the following:

• Resume Building

• LinkedIn Profile Guidance

• Mock Interviews

• HR Interview Preparation

• Technical Interview Preparation

• Career Guidance
The academy also provides internship support and placement assistance as part of its career-focused training approach.
Who Can Join This Course?
The Data Science course is suitable for

• Engineering Students

• BCA Students

• MCA Students

• BSc IT Students

• Graduates from Any Stream

• Working Professionals

• Career Changers
Even students with little or no programming experience can begin learning through the structured curriculum.
Why Practical Learning Matters
Many students complete online courses but struggle during interviews because they lack practical experience.
At Skills IT Academy, the focus is on:

• Live Coding

• Real-Time Projects

• Industry Case Studies

• Hands-On Assignments

• Problem Solving
This practical approach helps students build confidence before attending interviews.
Why Learn from Santosh Dhulgand, Sir?
Students receive guidance from Santosh Dhulgand Sir, who emphasizes practical implementation, structured learning, and industry readiness.
The training methodology focuses on:

• Concept Clarity

• Daily Practice

• Project Development

• Interview Preparation

• Career Guidance
The objective is to help students become confident data science professionals rather than simply completing a certification course.
Why Skills IT Academy Stands Out
Choosing the right software training institute in Pune can significantly influence your career growth.
Skills IT Academy offers:

• Practical Data Science Training

• Python for Data Science

• Machine Learning

The academy has trained thousands of learners and offers job-oriented programs with practical exposure.
Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
Is the data science course suitable for beginners?
Yes. The course starts with Python fundamentals and gradually progresses to machine learning and AI concepts.
Does Skills IT Academy provide placement assistance?
Yes. Students receive placement assistance, resume guidance, mock interviews, and interview preparation.
Are real-time projects included?
Yes. Students work on practical projects and case studies to gain hands-on experience.
Can working professionals join the course?
Yes. Flexible weekday and weekend batches are available for working professionals.
Why choose Skills IT Academy?
Skills IT Academy combines practical training, real-time projects, experienced trainers, and placement assistance to help students become industry-ready data science professionals.
Final Thoughts
If your goal is to build a successful career in data science, choosing the right software training institute in Pune is an important decision.
Skills IT Academy focuses on practical learning, real-world projects, interview preparation, and placement support rather than only theoretical knowledge. Whether you are a student, fresher, or working professional, the structured curriculum and hands-on approach can help you develop the skills needed to succeed in today’s data-driven industry.
Start Your Data Science Career with Skills IT Academy.

Students benefit from:
